options.content:
- Use Cases: This dashboard shows project management metrics from Taiga across all issue types (User Stories, Tasks, Issues/Requirements, Epics).
- Data Source Required: Taiga
- Metrics: Issue throughput (filtered by type), lead time, story points (User Stories), milestone progress, assignee breakdown and issue type breakdown.
- Use the **Issue Type** variable to filter panels to a specific type, or select All to see all types together.

panels.title: Dashboard Introduction
1. Issue Throughput

panels.description: Total number of user stories created in the selected time range and board.

targets.rawSql:
select
  count(distinct i.id) as value
from issues i
  join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
where
  i.type in (${type})
  and $__timeFilter(i.created_date)
  and bi.board_id in (${board_id})

panels.title: Number of Issues [Created in Selected Time Range]

panels.description: Total number of issues that have been marked as Done/Closed in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql:
select
  count(distinct i.id) as value
from issues i
  join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
where
  i.type in (${type})
  and i.status = 'DONE'
  and $__timeFilter(i.created_date)
  and bi.board_id in (${board_id})

panels.title: Number of Closed Issues [Created in Selected Time Range]

panels.description: Monthly distribution of open vs. closed issues.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_ADD(date(i.created_date), INTERVAL -DAYOFMONTH(date(i.created_date))+1 DAY) as time,
  count(distinct case when status != 'DONE' then i.id else null end) as "Number of Open Stories",
  count(distinct case when status = 'DONE' then i.id else null end) as "Number of Closed Stories"
FROM issues i
  join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
where
  i.type in (${type})
  and $__timeFilter(i.created_date)
  and bi.board_id in (${board_id})
group by 1

panels.title: Issue Status Distribution over Month [Created in Selected Time Range]

panels.description: Issue Delivery Rate = count(Closed Issues) / count(All Issues)

targets.rawSql:
with _requirements as(
  select
    count(distinct i.id) as total_count,
    count(distinct case when i.status = 'DONE' then i.id else null end) as delivered_count
  from issues i
    join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
  where
    i.type in (${type})
    and $__timeFilter(i.created_date)
    and bi.board_id in (${board_id})
)

select
  now() as time,
  1.0 * delivered_count/total_count as requirement_delivery_rate
from _requirements

panels.title: Issue Delivery Rate [Created in Selected Time Range]

panels.description: Monthly trend of issue delivery rate.

targets.rawSql:
with _requirements as(
  select
    DATE_ADD(date(i.created_date), INTERVAL -DAYOFMONTH(date(i.created_date))+1 DAY) as time,
    1.0 * count(distinct case when i.status = 'DONE' then i.id else null end)/count(distinct i.id) as delivered_rate
  from issues i
    join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
  where
    i.type in (${type})
    and $__timeFilter(i.created_date)
    and bi.board_id in (${board_id})
  group by 1
)

select
  time,
  delivered_rate
from _requirements
order by time

panels.title: Issue Delivery Rate over Time [Created in Selected Time Range]
2. Issue Lead Time

panels.description: Average number of days from story creation to resolution.

targets.rawSql:
select
  avg(lead_time_minutes/1440) as value
from issues i
  join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
where
  i.type in (${type})
  and i.status = 'DONE'
  and $__timeFilter(i.resolution_date)
  and bi.board_id in (${board_id})

panels.title: Mean Lead Time in Days [Resolved in Selected Time Range]

panels.description: 80% of stories are resolved within this many days.

targets.rawSql:
with _ranks as(
  select
    i.lead_time_minutes,
    percent_rank() over (order by lead_time_minutes asc) as ranks
  from issues i
    join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
  where
    i.type in (${type})
    and i.status = 'DONE'
    and $__timeFilter(i.resolution_date)
    and bi.board_id in (${board_id})
)

select
  max(lead_time_minutes/1440) as value
from _ranks
where
  ranks <= 0.8

panels.title: 80% Stories' Lead Time ≤ # Days [Resolved in Selected Time Range]

panels.description: Mean lead time per month for resolved stories.

targets.rawSql:
with _requirements as(
  select
    DATE_ADD(date(i.resolution_date), INTERVAL -DAYOFMONTH(date(i.resolution_date))+1 DAY) as time,
    avg(lead_time_minutes/1440) as mean_lead_time
  from issues i
    join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
  where
    i.type in (${type})
    and i.status = 'DONE'
    and $__timeFilter(i.resolution_date)
    and bi.board_id in (${board_id})
  group by 1
)

select
  date_format(time,'%M %Y') as month,
  mean_lead_time
from _requirements
order by time asc

panels.title: Mean Lead Time by Month [Resolved in Selected Time Range]

panels.description: The cumulative distribution of story lead time. Each point shows the percent rank of a given lead time value.

targets.rawSql:
with _ranks as(
  select
    round(i.lead_time_minutes/1440) as lead_time_day
  from issues i
    join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
  where
    i.type in (${type})
    and i.status = 'DONE'
    and $__timeFilter(i.resolution_date)
    and bi.board_id in (${board_id})
  order by lead_time_day asc
)

select
  now() as time,
  lpad(concat(lead_time_day,'d'), 4, ' ') as metric,
  percent_rank() over (order by lead_time_day asc) as value
from _ranks
order by lead_time_day asc

panels.title: Cumulative Distribution of Lead Time [Resolved in Selected Time Range]
3. Story Points

panels.description: Total story points for all user stories in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql:
select
  sum(ts.total_points) as value
from _tool_taiga_user_stories ts
  join board_issues bi on bi.issue_id = concat('taiga:TaigaUserStory:', ts.connection_id, ':', ts.user_story_id)
where
  bi.board_id in (${board_id})

panels.title: Total Story Points

panels.description: Total story points for closed/completed user stories.

targets.rawSql:
select
  sum(ts.total_points) as value
from _tool_taiga_user_stories ts
  join board_issues bi on bi.issue_id = concat('taiga:TaigaUserStory:', ts.connection_id, ':', ts.user_story_id)
  join issues i on i.id = bi.issue_id
where
  bi.board_id in (${board_id})
  and i.status = 'DONE'

panels.title: Completed Story Points

panels.description: Story points allocated to each milestone/sprint. Requires milestone data from Taiga.

targets.rawSql:
select
  COALESCE(NULLIF(ts.milestone_name,''), 'No Milestone') as Milestone,
  sum(ts.total_points) as `Story Points`
from _tool_taiga_user_stories ts
  join board_issues bi on bi.issue_id = concat('taiga:TaigaUserStory:', ts.connection_id, ':', ts.user_story_id)
where
  bi.board_id in (${board_id})
group by 1
order by `Story Points` desc

panels.title: Story Points by Milestone

panels.description: Story points distributed across assignees.

targets.rawSql:
select
  COALESCE(NULLIF(i.assignee_name,''), 'Unassigned') as Assignee,
  sum(i.story_point) as `Story Points`
from issues i
  join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
where
  i.type in (${type})
  and $__timeFilter(i.created_date)
  and bi.board_id in (${board_id})
group by 1
order by `Story Points` desc

panels.title: Story Points by Assignee [Created in Selected Time Range]

panels.description: Distribution of story points across open vs. closed stories.

targets.rawSql:
select
  sum(ts.total_points) as `Story Points`,
  CASE WHEN i.status = 'DONE' THEN 'Completed' ELSE 'In Progress' END as Status
from _tool_taiga_user_stories ts
  join board_issues bi on bi.issue_id = concat('taiga:TaigaUserStory:', ts.connection_id, ':', ts.user_story_id)
  join issues i on i.id = bi.issue_id
where
  bi.board_id in (${board_id})
group by Status

panels.title: Story Points: Completed vs In Progress
4. Issues Overview

panels.description: Breakdown of all Taiga issues by their current status, across all issue types (User Story, Task, Issue/Requirement, Epic).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  now() as time,
  count(distinct case when i.status = 'TODO' then i.id end) as 'To Do',
  count(distinct case when i.status = 'IN_PROGRESS' then i.id end) as 'In Progress',
  count(distinct case when i.status = 'DONE' then i.id end) as 'Done',
  count(distinct case when i.status not in ('TODO','IN_PROGRESS','DONE') then i.id end) as 'Other'
FROM issues i
  join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
WHERE bi.board_id in (${board_id})

panels.title: Issues by Status

panels.description: Number of user stories assigned to each team member.

targets.rawSql:
select
  COALESCE(NULLIF(i.assignee_name,''), 'Unassigned') as Assignee,
  count(distinct i.id) as `User Stories`
from issues i
  join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
where
  i.type in (${type})
  and $__timeFilter(i.created_date)
  and bi.board_id in (${board_id})
group by 1
order by `User Stories` desc

panels.title: Issues by Assignee [Created in Selected Time Range]

panels.description: Number of user stories in each milestone/sprint.

targets.rawSql:
select
  COALESCE(NULLIF(ts.milestone_name,''), 'No Milestone') as Milestone,
  count(distinct ts.user_story_id) as `User Stories`
from _tool_taiga_user_stories ts
  join board_issues bi on bi.issue_id = concat('taiga:TaigaUserStory:', ts.connection_id, ':', ts.user_story_id)
where
  bi.board_id in (${board_id})
group by 1
order by `User Stories` desc

panels.title: User Stories per Milestone

panels.description: Milestone progress: open vs. closed user stories per sprint.

targets.rawSql:
select
  COALESCE(NULLIF(ts.milestone_name,''), 'No Milestone') as Milestone,
  count(distinct case when i.status != 'DONE' then ts.user_story_id else null end) as `Open Stories`,
  count(distinct case when i.status = 'DONE' then ts.user_story_id else null end) as `Closed Stories`
from _tool_taiga_user_stories ts
  join board_issues bi on bi.issue_id = concat('taiga:TaigaUserStory:', ts.connection_id, ':', ts.user_story_id)
  join issues i on i.id = bi.issue_id
where
  bi.board_id in (${board_id})
group by 1
order by `Closed Stories` desc

panels.title: Milestone Progress: Open vs. Closed Stories

options.content: This dashboard is created based on this [data schema](https://devlake.apache.org/docs/DataModels/DevLakeDomainLayerSchema). Want to add more metrics? Please follow the [guide](https://devlake.apache.org/docs/Configuration/Dashboards/GrafanaUserGuide).

panels.title: 5. Issue Type Breakdown

panels.description: Distribution of all Taiga items across issue types (User Story, Task, Issue/Requirement, Epic).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  now() as time,
  count(distinct case when i.type = 'USER_STORY' then i.id end) as 'User Story',
  count(distinct case when i.type = 'TASK' then i.id end) as 'Task',
  count(distinct case when i.type = 'REQUIREMENT' then i.id end) as 'Issue',
  count(distinct case when i.type = 'EPIC' then i.id end) as 'Epic'
FROM issues i
  join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
WHERE bi.board_id in (${board_id})

panels.title: Issues by Type

panels.description: Open vs closed count for each Taiga issue type in the selected time range.

targets.rawSql:
select
  COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) as `Issue Type`,
  count(distinct case when i.status != 'DONE' then i.id else null end) as `Open`,
  count(distinct case when i.status = 'DONE' then i.id else null end) as `Closed`
from issues i
  join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
where
  $__timeFilter(i.created_date)
  and bi.board_id in (${board_id})
group by 1
order by 1

panels.title: Open vs Closed by Type [Created in Selected Time Range]

panels.description: Monthly count of items created, broken down by issue type (User Stories, Tasks, Issues, Epics).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  DATE_ADD(date(i.created_date), INTERVAL -DAYOFMONTH(date(i.created_date))+1 DAY) as time,
  count(distinct case when i.type='USER_STORY' then i.id end) as 'User Stories',
  count(distinct case when i.type='TASK' then i.id end) as 'Tasks',
  count(distinct case when i.type='REQUIREMENT' then i.id end) as 'Issues',
  count(distinct case when i.type='EPIC' then i.id end) as 'Epics'
FROM issues i
  join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
WHERE
  bi.board_id in (${board_id})
  AND $__timeFilter(i.created_date)
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Items Created per Month by Type

panels.description: Average lead time in days from creation to resolution, broken down by issue type (resolved issues only).

targets.rawSql:
select
  COALESCE(i.original_type, i.type) as `Issue Type`,
  round(avg(
    COALESCE(i.lead_time_minutes, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, i.created_date, i.resolution_date))
  /1440), 1) as `Avg Lead Time (days)`
from issues i
  join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id
where
  i.status = 'DONE'
  and bi.board_id in (${board_id})
group by 1
having `Avg Lead Time (days)` is not null
order by 2 desc

panels.title: Average Lead Time by Type

list.definition: select concat(name, '--', id) from boards where id like 'taiga%'
list.label: Choose Project
list.name: board_id
list.query: select concat(name, '--', id) from boards where id like 'taiga%'

list.definition: select distinct i.type from issues i join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id where bi.board_id like 'taiga%'
list.label: Issue Type
list.name: type
list.query: select distinct i.type from issues i join board_issues bi on i.id = bi.issue_id where bi.board_id like 'taiga%'
